features.name: Authentication System
features.description: Complete user authentication with Supabase including login, register, password reset, and role-based access control

features.name: AI Studio
features.description: AI-powered design tools for generating images, logos, and fonts using OpenAI API

features.name: Print Services
features.description: Print-on-demand services including digital printing, large format, and event stands

features.name: Product Management
features.description: Product catalog, individual product pages, and product configuration

features.name: Shopping Cart
features.description: Shopping cart functionality for both physical and digital products

features.name: Payment Processing
features.description: Multi-gateway payment processing with PayPal and Wompi, including 3DS authentication

features.name: Order Management
features.description: Order processing, tracking, and management system

features.name: Checkout Process
features.description: Complete checkout flow for both regular and simplified checkout

features.name: Admin Dashboard
features.description: Administrative interface for managing orders, products, users, payments, and system settings

features.name: User Dashboard
features.description: User dashboard for managing personal orders, designs, and account settings

features.name: Digital Products
features.description: Digital product management and download system

features.name: Design Editor
features.description: Interactive design editor for customizing products

features.name: Quote System
features.description: Quote request and management system for custom orders

features.name: Navigation
features.description: Main navigation component with responsive design

features.name: Database Integration
features.description: Supabase database integration with connection management and setup

features.name: Email Services
features.description: Email service integration for notifications and communications

features.name: Internationalization
features.description: Multi-language support with translation files

features.name: UI Components
features.description: Reusable UI components built with Radix UI and Tailwind CSS

features.name: Image Utilities
features.description: Image processing and utility functions

features.name: Testing and Debug
